visual: Steps into a bow stance while one hand sweeps across the forward knee and the opposite hand pushes forward at shoulder height, alternating sides.
motion_description: Beginning with the weight entirely on the right leg, the left foot steps forward. As the weight shifts steadily onto the left leg to form a bow stance, the left hand sweeps downward in a semi-circular arc, finishing just above the left knee. Simultaneously, the right arm, initially raised, extends forward in a pushing motion, with the palm facing outward at shoulder height. The torso rotates subtly forward to support the push throughout this slow, continuous sequence.
